llm_verdict.message: I acknowledge the assessment: the system is Rocky Linux, which does not meet the “installed_OS_is_vendor_supported” requirement because it is not a Red Hat‑provided, vendor‑supported RHEL release. Since converting the OS to a supported RHEL version requires a full OS migration that cannot be performed safely with the available `run_cmd`, `read_file`, and `write_file` tools, no remediation actions will be taken in this session. The finding will remain until the operating system is replaced with a supported RHEL version through an appropriate upgrade or reinstall process performed outside of this automated remediation.
